subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Thy letter reached the Court of Divine Oneness, where humble supplications were offered, seeking aid and bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان نامه شما رسید ببارگاه احدیت عجز و لابه گردید و طلب عون و عنایت
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @The Holy Spirit
